text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm Tokai Teio! Nice to meet you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So the thing is, I want to be a super tough and
cool racer, just like Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That means I have to win a whole load of races,
but you can count on me! Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
